test.command: bun run test --run (admin subset: npx vitest run src/pages/admin/)
test.details: 13 test files, 198 tests passed, 0 failed. Full suite times out (>10min) but admin tests pass in 2.4s.

lint.details: Initially failed with 3 unused-vars in OperationsControlPage.tsx. Fixed by adding eslint-disable-next-line comments (inline stub params). Passed after fix.

appliedUpdates.description: Removed dead admin-operations nav entry from ADMIN_NAV array (was a blocking review finding for hide-non-spec-pages-cleanup)
Added eslint-disable-next-line comments for unused _enabled and _key params in inline stubs
Added Admin Portal Response Shape Notes section documenting dashboard 3-vs-4 highlights mismatch, roles API shape mismatch, and settings read-only behavior
Added notes about missing Textarea shared component and CommandPalette as navigation component requiring route sync updates

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: data-testid attributes for testability. Workers are adding data-testid to components (StatCard, etc.) for reliable test targeting. This should be documented so all workers use it consistently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: dashboard-polish review found data-testid on StatCard.tsx but no convention documented in AGENTS.md

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify when frontend-skill invocation is mandatory vs optional. Three workers noted that invoking frontend-skill is unnecessary for polish/test-only/cleanup tasks where no new UI is being created. The skill should distinguish between 'new UI creation' (mandatory) and 'polish/existing UI refinement/cleanup' (optional).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: dashboard-polish, settings-page-polish, and hide-non-spec-pages-cleanup all reported unnecessary frontend-skill overhead in their skillFeedback

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about CommandPalette.tsx being a navigation component that must be updated alongside Sidebar.tsx when routes change. Workers cleaning up routes should update both files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: hide-non-spec-pages-cleanup missed CommandPalette.tsx ADMIN_NAV entry, creating a dead nav link. Reviewer caught it and scrutiny validator fixed it.

rejectedObservations.observation: Select component labelIcon prop naming differs from Input component's leftIcon/rightIcon pattern
rejectedObservations.reason: Non-blocking observation, not actionable as a convention change. The labelIcon prop is well-named for its purpose (icon in label, not in input field). No change needed.

rejectedObservations.observation: selectedUserId typed as number|'' has theoretical edge case with id=0
rejectedObservations.reason: Practically impossible with database-generated IDs. Not worth documenting.
